sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; /** * DashboardPreview component - Shows a mockup of the dashboard with calendar and side panels * @param {Object} props - Component props * @param {string} props.title - Preview section title * @param {string} props.subtitle - Preview section subtitle * @param {Object} props.leaveBalances - Object with EL, SL, CL balances * @param {Array} props.longWeekends - Array of long weekend objects */ const DashboardPreview = ({ title = "See PlanWise in Action", subtitle = "Your smart leave planning dashboard", leaveBalances = { EL: 12, SL: 8, CL: 3 }, longWeekends = [ "Mar 15-18 (4 days)", "Apr 19-22 (4 days)", "May 24-27 (4 days)" ] }) => { return (

{title}

{subtitle}

{/* Calendar Mock */}

March 2024

{['S', 'M', 'T', 'W', 'T', 'F', 'S'].map((day, i) => (
{day}
))} {Array.from({length: 28}, (_, i) => (
{i + 1}
))}
{/* Side Panel */}
Leave Balances
EL: {leaveBalances.EL} days
SL: {leaveBalances.SL} days
CL: {leaveBalances.CL} days
Long Weekends
{longWeekends.map((weekend, index) => (
• {weekend}
))}
); }; export default DashboardPreview;
